hooks.name: Steering-Wiki Sync Check
hooks.description: When steering files are edited, reminds to check if the corresponding wiki page needs the same update for consistency.

action.prompt: A steering file was just edited. Check if the corresponding wiki page (in the wiki/ directory) covers the same information and is consistent. If the wiki page is outdated or missing the new content, remind the user to update it. Key mappings: code-conventions.md → wiki/Code-Conventions.md, stack-management.md → wiki/CLI-Reference.md + wiki/Configuration.md, development-workflow.md → wiki/Contributing.md.
